javax.media.mscontrol.resource
Interface Resource<T extends ResourceContainer>

All Known Subinterfaces:
Player, Recorder, SdpPortManager, SignalDetector, SignalGenerator, VideoRenderer
public interface Resource<T extends ResourceContainer>

Interface for things common to Resources. Every Resource interface (like Player, etc.) extends this interface.

Field Summary
static Value FOR_EVER
          Value to indicate an infinite duration
static int FOREVER
          Special int value (-1) corresponding to FOR_EVER.
